description: Dowry list. Dating: Early 12th century. The marriage is between a widow and a widower, both promising to educate the children of the other party until they would marry. Signed: Shela b. ʿAmram; Yosef b. Natan ha-Levi ha-Ḥazzan; Kawkab b. Naʿīm. Reused on recto for Hebrew literary text. (Information in part from Goitein's index card.)
description_he: מסמך משפטי ביהודית-ערבית. מוחזק בספריית קיימברידג'.
